name: LG_STKHANDLEINOUT_523_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_STKHANDLEINOUT_523_01
       @par_Coef              SMALLINT,
       @par_ItemRef           INT,
       @par_VariantRef        INT,
       @par_InvoiceRef        INT,
       @par_DiffPrice         FLOAT,
       @par_DiffRepPrice      FLOAT,
       @par_DistCost          FLOAT,
       @par_DistAddExp        FLOAT,
       @par_Amount            FLOAT,
       @par_U1Cfact           FLOAT,
       @par_U2CFact           FLOAT,
       @par_Price             FLOAT,
       @par_VatPer            FLOAT,
       @par_VatIncFlag        SMALLINT,
       @par_TrCode            SMALLINT,
       @par_BilledFlag        SMALLINT,
       @par_OrdAmount         FLOAT,
       @par_CalcSign          SMALLINT,
       @par_OrdU1CFact        FLOAT,
       @par_OrdU2CFact        FLOAT,
       @par_ReportRate        FLOAT,
       @par_SourceType        SMALLINT,
       @par_InvenNo           SMALLINT,
       @par_WStRef            INT,
       @par_OrdInvenNo        SMALLINT,
       @par_TransDate         DATETIME,
       @par_TrMonth           SMALLINT,
       @par_LineType          SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdWasteFlag      SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdProdInFlag     SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdCountAddFlag   SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdCountDecFlag   SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdOtherInFlag    SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdOtherOutFlag   SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdTransferedFlag SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdOrderFlag      SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdOrdOnVehFlag   SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdSaleFlag       SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdPurchaseFlag   SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdAvgFlag        SMALLINT,
       @par_OrdRecvFlag       SMALLINT,
       @par_OrdResFlag        SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdStcFlag        SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdTempInFlag     SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdTempOutFlag    SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdForTotFlag     SMALLINT,
       @par_OrdTransRef       INT,
       @par_DistOrdLineRef    INT,
       @par_OrdFicheRef       INT,
       @par_PrevLineRef       INT,
       @par_DetLine           SMALLINT,
       @par_PrevLineNo        SMALLINT,
       @par_LProdStat         SMALLINT,
       @par_FcStat            SMALLINT,
       @par_Year              SMALLINT,
       @par_UpdResFlag        SMALLINT,
       @par_UOMRef            INT,
       @par_OrdUOMRef         INT,
       @par_offTrRef          INT,
       @par_offerRef          INT AS
 
DECLARE @Epsilon FLOAT
DECLARE @c_PStatPlanned SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_PStatRealized SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_TrWarehouse SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_TrWorkStation SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_STrans SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_Promotion SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_LDiscount SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_LExpense SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_Service SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_Deposit SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_Composite SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_CompLine SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_FATrans SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_SubContract SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_LOption SMALLINT
DECLARE @c_LClass SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_MalAlim SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_PerSatIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_TopSatIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_KonsCikIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_KonsGiris SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_AlimIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_PerSatis SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_TopSatis SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_KonsCikis SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_KonsGirIade SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_Fire SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_Sarf SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_UretGiris SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_Devir SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_AlFiyatFarki SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_VerFiyatFarki SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_MalzGirIlk SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_MalzGirSon SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_MalzCikIlk SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_MalzCikSon SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_Ambar SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_Mustahsil SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_IrsGirIlk SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_IrsGirSon SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_IrsCikIlk SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_IrsCikSon SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_SayimFazlasi SMALLINT
DECLARE @ft_SayimEksigi SMALLINT
DECLARE @dCost FLOAT
DECLARE @eCost FLOAT
DECLARE @convertedAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @convertedPrice FLOAT
DECLARE @ordTransDate DATETIME
DECLARE @addAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @addOrdAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @addValue FLOAT
DECLARE @addExpValue FLOAT
DECLARE @currAddValue FLOAT
DECLARE @currAddExpValue FLOAT
DECLARE @stcValue FLOAT
DECLARE @currStcValue FLOAT
DECLARE @stcValueV FLOAT
DECLARE @currStcValueV FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_SaleAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_SaleInCash FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_CurrSaleInCash FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PurchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PurchaseInCash FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_CurrPurchaseInCash FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_OnHand FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_TempIn FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_TempOut FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_Transfer FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_Shipped FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_OnVehicled FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_Received FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PlnProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_PlnProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_PlnProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PlnWaste FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActWaste FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PlnOtherIn FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActOtherIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PlnOtherOut FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActOtherOut FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_Purchase FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_Sale FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_Reserved FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActSaleOrder FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActPurchaseOrder FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_purchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_purchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_PurchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_PurchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_AvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_CurrAvgValue FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_TotalInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_Transferred FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_purchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_purchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_PurchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_PurchaseAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_PlnProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_PlnProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_ActProdIn FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_ActOtherInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_ActInvenInputs FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_ActInvenInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_ActInvenInputs FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_ActInvenInputs FLOAT
DECLARE @invDtV_ActInvenOutputs FLOAT
DECLARE @invTotV_ActInvenOutput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDtV_ActInvenOutputs FLOAT
DECLARE @genTotV_ActInvenOutputs FLOAT
DECLARE @adjustedAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @convFactor FLOAT
DECLARE @orderConvFactor FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PlnInvenInput FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActInvenInput FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_ActInvenInputs FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_ActInvenInput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_ActInvenInputs FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_ActInvenInputs FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_PlnInvenOutput FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_ActInvenOutput FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_ActInvenOutputs FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_ActInvenOutput FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_ActInvenOutputs FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_ActInvenOutputs FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_CountAdd FLOAT
DECLARE @invDt_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @invTot_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @genDt_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @genTot_CountDec FLOAT
DECLARE @ordUpdAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @incAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @inc_OffOrdAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @leftToShipment FLOAT
DECLARE @extraShipment FLOAT
DECLARE @shpAmount FLOAT
DECLARE @OrdClosed SMALLINT
DECLARE @OrdCancelled SMALLINT
DECLARE @OrdCheck SMALLINT
DECLARE @Q FLOAT
DECLARE @W FLOAT
DECLARE @E FLOAT
DECLARE @R FLOAT
DECLARE @T FLOAT
DECLARE @FRMNR INT
DECLARE @VIRTUALINVEN SMALLINT
DECLARE @ShippedAmntSugg FLOAT
SELECT @FRMNR = CAST('523' AS SMALLINT)
 ,@VIRTUALINVEN = 0
SELECT @Epsilon = 0.0000001
SELECT @c_PStatPlanned = 1
 ,@c_PStatRealized = 0
SELECT @c_TrWarehouse = 0
 ,@c_TrWorkStation = 1
SELECT @c_STrans = 0
 ,@c_Promotion = 1
 ,@c_LDiscount = 2
 ,@c_LExpense = 3
 ,@c_Service = 4
 ,@c_Deposit = 5
 ,@c_Composite = 6
 ,@c_CompLine = 7
 ,@c_FATrans = 8
 ,@c_LOption = 9
 ,@c_LClass = 10
 ,@c_SubContract = 11
SELECT @ft_MalAlim = 1
 ,@ft_PerSatIade = 2
 ,@ft_TopSatIade = 3
 ,@ft_KonsCikIade = 4
 ,@ft_KonsGiris = 5
 ,@ft_AlimIade = 6
 ,@ft_PerSatis = 7
 ,@ft_TopSatis = 8
 ,@ft_KonsCikis = 9
 ,@ft_KonsGirIade = 10
 ,@ft_Fire = 11
 ,@ft_Sarf = 12
 ,@ft_UretGiris = 13
 ,@ft_Devir = 14
 ,@ft_AlFiyatFarki = 13
 ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki = 14
 ,@ft_MalzGirIlk = 15
 ,@ft_MalzGirSon = 19
 ,@ft_MalzCikIlk = 20
 ,@ft_MalzCikSon = 24
 ,@ft_Ambar = 25
 ,@ft_Mustahsil = 26
 ,@ft_IrsGirIlk = 30
 ,@ft_IrsGirSon = 34
 ,@ft_IrsCikIlk = 35
 ,@ft_IrsCikSon = 39
 ,@ft_SayimFazlasi = 50
 ,@ft_SayimEksigi = 51
SELECT @inc_Reserved = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActSaleOrder = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActPurchaseOrder = 0.0
 ,@inc_SaleAmount = 0.0
 ,@inc_SaleInCash = 0.0
 ,@inc_CurrSaleInCash = 0.0
 ,@inc_PurchaseAmount = 0.0
 ,@inc_PurchaseInCash = 0.0
 ,@inc_CurrPurchaseInCash = 0.0
 ,@inc_Transfer = 0.0
 ,@inc_TempIn = 0.0
 ,@inc_TempOut = 0.0
 ,@inc_OnHand = 0.0
 ,@inc_Shipped = 0.0
 ,@inc_OnVehicled = 0.0
 ,@inc_Received = 0.0
 ,@inc_PlnWaste = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActWaste = 0.0
 ,@inc_PlnProdIn = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActProdIn = 0.0
 ,@inc_CountAdd = 0.0
 ,@inc_CountDec = 0.0
 ,@inc_PlnOtherIn = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActOtherIn = 0.0
 ,@inc_PlnOtherOut = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActOtherOut = 0.0
 ,@inc_Purchase = 0.0
 ,@inc_Sale = 0.0
 ,@inc_PlnInvenInput = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActInvenInput = 0.0
 ,@inc_PlnInvenOutput = 0.0
 ,@inc_ActInvenOutput = 0.0
EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @par_U1Cfact
 ,@par_U2CFact
 ,@convFactor OUTPUT
EXECUTE LG_CONVFACT @par_OrdU1CFact
 ,@par_OrdU2CFact
 ,@orderConvFactor OUTPUT
SET @ordTransDate = @par_TransDate
SET @addOrdAmount = 0
SELECT @convertedAmount = @par_Amount * @convFactor
SELECT @convertedPrice = @par_Price
IF (@par_VatIncFlag = 1)
 SELECT @convertedPrice = (@convertedPrice * 100.0) / (@par_VatPer + 100.0)
IF (@convFactor > @Epsilon)
 SELECT @convertedPrice = @convertedPrice / @convFactor
IF (@par_UpdTransferedFlag = 1)
BEGIN
 SELECT @dCost = 0.0
 SELECT @eCost = 0.0
END
ELSE
BEGIN
 SELECT @dCost = @par_DistCost + @par_DistAddExp
 SELECT @eCost = @par_DistCost
END
IF (
  @par_TrCode IN (
   @ft_AlFiyatFarki
   ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
   )
  ) AND (@par_BilledFlag = 1)
 SELECT @addAmount = 0
ELSE
 SELECT @addAmount = @par_Coef * @par_CalcSign * @convertedAmount
/*SELECT @inc_OffOrdAmount = @par_Coef * @convertedAmount*/
SELECT @inc_OffOrdAmount = @par_Coef * @par_Amount * @orderConvFactor
IF (
  @par_TrCode IN (
   @ft_AlimIade
   ,@ft_TopSatIade
   ,@ft_PerSatIade
   ,@ft_KonsGirIade
   ,@ft_KonsCikIade
   )
  )
 SELECT @inc_OffOrdAmount = - 1 * @inc_OffOrdAmount
IF @par_UpdOrderFlag = 1
BEGIN
 SELECT @leftToShipment = (AMOUNT - SHIPPEDAMOUNT) * UINFO2 / UINFO1
  ,@extraShipment = (SHIPPEDAMOUNT - AMOUNT) * UINFO2 / UINFO1
  ,@ordTransDate = DATE_
  ,@OrdClosed = CLOSED
  ,@OrdCancelled = CANCELLED
  ,@ShippedAmntSugg = SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG
 FROM LG_523_01_ORFLINE
 WHERE (LOGICALREF = @par_OrdTransRef)
 SELECT @OrdCheck = @OrdClosed + @OrdCancelled
 IF (@par_UOMRef = @par_OrdUOMRef) /*different from main unit but the same unit in order and dispatch*/
  SELECT @shpAmount = @par_Amount * @orderConvFactor
 ELSE
  SELECT @shpAmount = @convertedAmount
 IF @par_Coef = 1
 BEGIN
  IF @leftToShipment < @Epsilon
   SET @leftToShipment = 0
  IF @shpAmount > @leftToShipment /*@convertedAmount > @leftToShipment*/
   SET @addOrdAmount = @par_Coef * @par_CalcSign * @leftToShipment
  ELSE
   SET @addOrdAmount = @par_Coef * @par_CalcSign * @shpAmount /*@par_Coef * @par_CalcSign* @convertedAmount*/
 END
 IF @par_Coef = - 1
 BEGIN
  IF @extraShipment < @Epsilon
   SET @extraShipment = 0
  SET @addOrdAmount = (@shpAmount - @extraShipment) /*(@convertedAmount - @extraShipment)*/
  IF @addOrdAmount < @Epsilon
   SET @addOrdAmount = 0
  SET @addOrdAmount = @par_CalcSign * @par_Coef * @addOrdAmount
 END
 IF (
   @par_TrCode IN (
    @ft_AlimIade
    ,@ft_TopSatIade
    ,@ft_PerSatIade
    ,@ft_KonsGirIade
    ,@ft_KonsCikIade
    )
   ) AND ((@par_OrdTransRef > 0) OR (@par_OrdTransRef IS NOT NULL))
 BEGIN
  SELECT @Q = @leftToShipment
  SELECT @W = @extraShipment
  SELECT @E = @shpAmount /*@convertedAmount*/
  SELECT @R = (@shpAmount - @extraShipment) /*(@convertedAmount - @extraShipment)*/
  SELECT @T = @addOrdAmount
  SELECT @addOrdAmount = 0
  IF (@par_coef = 1)
  BEGIN
   IF (@leftToShipment = 0) AND (@r > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @addOrdAmount = @r
   IF (@leftToShipment > @Epsilon) AND (@r > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @addOrdAmount = @shpAmount /*@convertedAmount*/
  END
  IF (@par_coef = - 1)
  BEGIN
   IF (@leftToShipment > @Epsilon) AND (@extraShipment = 0) AND (@shpAmount > @Epsilon
     ) AND (@leftToShipment > @shpAmount)
    SELECT @addOrdAmount = - @shpAmount /*-@convertedAmount*/
   IF (@leftToShipment > @Epsilon) AND (@extraShipment = 0) AND (@shpAmount > @Epsilon
     ) AND (@leftToShipment < @shpAmount)
    SELECT @addOrdAmount = - @leftToShipment
   IF (@leftToShipment > @Epsilon) AND (@extraShipment = 0) AND (@shpAmount > @Epsilon
     ) AND (@leftToShipment = @shpAmount)
    SELECT @addOrdAmount = - @leftToShipment
  END
  IF @par_TrCode IN (
    @ft_AlimIade
    ,@ft_KonsGirIade
    )
   SELECT @addOrdAmount = - @addOrdAmount
 END
END
SELECT @addValue = @par_Coef * @par_CalcSign * (@convertedAmount * @convertedPrice - @dCost)
IF (@par_TrCode = @ft_SayimFazlasi)
BEGIN
 SELECT @addExpValue = @par_Coef * (- @par_CalcSign) * (@convertedAmount * @convertedPrice - @eCost)
END
ELSE
BEGIN
 SELECT @addExpValue = @par_Coef * @par_CalcSign * (@convertedAmount * @convertedPrice - @eCost)
END
IF (@par_ReportRate > @Epsilon)
BEGIN
 SELECT @currAddValue = @addValue / @par_ReportRate
 SELECT @currAddExpValue = @addExpValue / @par_ReportRate
END
ELSE
BEGIN
 SELECT @currAddValue = 0.0
 SELECT @currAddExpValue = 0.0
END
IF (@par_LineType <> @c_Deposit)
BEGIN
 IF (@par_UpdStcFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  IF (@par_TrCode = @ft_SayimFazlasi)
   SELECT @inc_OnHand = - @addAmount
  ELSE
   SELECT @inc_OnHand = @addAmount
 END
 IF (@par_UpdTempInFlag = 1)
  SELECT @inc_TempIn = @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdTempOutFlag = 1)
  SELECT @inc_TempOut = - @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdTransferedFlag = 1)
  SELECT @inc_Transfer = @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdWasteFlag = 1)
  IF (@par_LProdStat = @c_PStatPlanned)
   SELECT @inc_PlnWaste = - @addAmount
  ELSE
   SELECT @inc_ActWaste = - @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdProdInFlag = 1)
  IF (@par_LProdStat = @c_PStatPlanned)
   SELECT @inc_PlnProdIn = @addAmount
  ELSE
   SELECT @inc_ActProdIn = @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdCountAddFlag = 1)
  SELECT @inc_CountAdd = - @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdCountDecFlag = 1)
  SELECT @inc_CountDec = - @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdOtherInFlag = 1)
  IF (@par_LProdStat = @c_PStatPlanned)
   SELECT @inc_PlnOtherIn = @addAmount
  ELSE
   SELECT @inc_ActOtherIn = @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdOtherOutFlag = 1)
  IF (@par_LProdStat = @c_PStatPlanned)
   SELECT @inc_PlnOtherOut = - @addAmount
  ELSE
   SELECT @inc_ActOtherOut = - @addAmount
 IF (@par_UpdPurchaseFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @inc_Purchase = @addAmount
  SELECT @inc_PurchaseInCash = @addExpValue
  SELECT @inc_CurrPurchaseInCash = @currAddExpValue
 END
 IF (@par_UpdSaleFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @inc_Sale = - @addAmount
  SELECT @inc_SaleInCash = @addExpValue
  SELECT @inc_CurrSaleInCash = @currAddExpValue
 END
 IF (@par_TrCode = @ft_Ambar) AND ((@par_fcStat = 0) OR (@par_fcStat IS NULL)
   )
 BEGIN
  IF (@par_UpdAvgFlag = 1)
   IF (@par_LProdStat = @c_PStatPlanned)
    SELECT @inc_PlnInvenInput = @addAmount
   ELSE
    SELECT @inc_ActInvenInput = @addAmount
  ELSE
   IF (@par_LProdStat = @c_PStatPlanned)
    SELECT @inc_PlnInvenOutput = - @addAmount
   ELSE
    SELECT @inc_ActInvenOutput = - @addAmount
 END
 IF (@par_UpdAvgFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @invDt_TotalInput = @invDt_Transferred + @invDt_purchaseAmount + @invDt_ActProdIn + @invDt_CountAdd +
   @invDt_ActOtherInput + @invDt_ActInvenInputs - @invDt_ActInvenOutputs - @invDt_CountDec
  IF (@invDt_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invDt_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @stcValue = @invDt_AvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @stcValue = @invDt_TotalInput * @invDt_AvgValue
  IF (@invDt_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invDt_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @currStcValue = @invDt_CurrAvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @currStcValue = @invDt_TotalInput * @invDt_CurrAvgValue
  SELECT @stcValue = @stcValue + @addExpValue
  SELECT @currStcValue = @currStcValue + @currAddExpValue
  SELECT @invDt_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @invDt_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @invDt_purchaseAmount + @inc_ActOtherIn +
   @invDt_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @invDt_ActProdIn + @inc_CountAdd + @invDt_CountAdd - @inc_CountDec -
   @invDt_CountDec + @inc_ActInvenInput + @invDt_ActInvenInputs - @inc_ActInvenOutput - @invDt_ActInvenOutputs
  IF (@invDt_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @invDt_AvgValue = @stcValue / @invDt_TotalInput
   SELECT @invDt_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValue / @invDt_TotalInput
  END
  ELSE
   IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
     @par_TrCode IN (
      @ft_AlFiyatFarki
      ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
      )
     )
   BEGIN
    SELECT @invDt_AvgValue = @invDt_AvgValue + @addExpValue
    SELECT @invDt_CurrAvgValue = @invDt_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    SELECT @invDt_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
    SELECT @invDt_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
   END
  IF (@par_VariantRef IS NOT NULL) AND (@par_VariantRef > 0)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @invDtV_TotalInput = @invDtV_Transferred + @invDtV_purchaseAmount + @invDtV_ActProdIn + @invDtV_CountAdd +
    @invDtV_ActOtherInput + @invDtV_ActInvenInputs - @invDtV_ActInvenOutputs - @invDtV_CountDec
   IF (@invDtV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invDtV_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @stcValueV = @invDtV_AvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @stcValueV = @invDtV_TotalInput * @invDtV_AvgValue
   IF (@invDtV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invDtV_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @invDtV_CurrAvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @invDtV_TotalInput * @invDtV_CurrAvgValue
   SELECT @stcValueV = @stcValueV + @addExpValue
   SELECT @currStcValueV = @currStcValueV + @currAddExpValue
   SELECT @invDtV_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @invDtV_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @invDtV_purchaseAmount +
    @inc_ActOtherIn + @invDtV_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @invDtV_ActProdIn + @inc_CountAdd + @invDtV_CountAdd -
    @inc_CountDec - @invDtV_CountDec + @inc_ActInvenInput + @invDtV_ActInvenInputs - @inc_ActInvenOutput -
    @invDtV_ActInvenOutputs
   IF (@invDtV_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @invDtV_AvgValue = @stcValueV / @invDtV_TotalInput
    SELECT @invDtV_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValueV / @invDtV_TotalInput
   END
   ELSE
    IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
      @par_TrCode IN (
       @ft_AlFiyatFarki
       ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
       )
      )
    BEGIN
     SELECT @invDtV_AvgValue = @invDtV_AvgValue + @addExpValue
     SELECT @invDtV_CurrAvgValue = @invDtV_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
     SELECT @invDtV_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
     SELECT @invDtV_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
    END
  END
 END
 IF (@par_UpdAvgFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @invTot_TotalInput = @invTot_Transferred + @invTot_purchaseAmount + @invTot_ActProdIn + @invTot_CountAdd -
   @invTot_CountDec + @invTot_ActOtherInput + @invTot_ActInvenInput - @invTot_ActInvenOutput
  IF (@invTot_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invTot_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @stcValue = @invTot_AvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @stcValue = @invTot_TotalInput * @invTot_AvgValue
  IF (@invTot_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invTot_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @currStcValue = @invTot_CurrAvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @currStcValue = @invTot_TotalInput * @invTot_CurrAvgValue
  SELECT @stcValue = @stcValue + @addExpValue
  SELECT @currStcValue = @currStcValue + @currAddExpValue
  SELECT @invTot_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @invTot_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @invTot_purchaseAmount + @inc_ActOtherIn +
   @invTot_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @invTot_ActProdIn + @invTot_CountAdd + @inc_CountAdd - @inc_CountDec -
   @invTot_CountDec + @invTot_ActInvenInput + @inc_ActInvenInput - @invTot_ActInvenOutput - @inc_ActInvenOutput
  IF (@invTot_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @invTot_AvgValue = @stcValue / @invTot_TotalInput
   SELECT @invTot_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValue / @invTot_TotalInput
  END
  ELSE
   IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
     @par_TrCode IN (
      @ft_AlFiyatFarki
      ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
      )
     )
   BEGIN
    SELECT @invTot_AvgValue = @invTot_AvgValue + @addExpValue
    SELECT @invTot_CurrAvgValue = @invTot_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    SELECT @invTot_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
    SELECT @invTot_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
   END
  IF (@par_VariantRef IS NOT NULL) AND (@par_VariantRef > 0)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @invTotV_TotalInput = @invTotV_Transferred + @invTotV_purchaseAmount + @invTotV_ActProdIn + @invTotV_CountAdd -
    @invTotV_CountDec + @invTotV_ActOtherInput + @invTotV_ActInvenInput - @invTotV_ActInvenOutput
   IF (@invTotV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invTotV_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @stcValueV = @invTotV_AvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @stcValueV = @invTotV_TotalInput * @invTotV_AvgValue
   IF (@invTotV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@invTotV_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @invTotV_CurrAvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @invTotV_TotalInput * @invTotV_CurrAvgValue
   SELECT @stcValueV = @stcValueV + @addExpValue
   SELECT @currStcValueV = @currStcValueV + @currAddExpValue
   SELECT @invTotV_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @invTotV_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @invTotV_purchaseAmount +
    @inc_ActOtherIn + @invTotV_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @invTotV_ActProdIn + @invTotV_CountAdd + @inc_CountAdd
    - @inc_CountDec - @invTotV_CountDec + @invTotV_ActInvenInput + @inc_ActInvenInput - @invTotV_ActInvenOutput -
    @inc_ActInvenOutput
   IF (@invTotV_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @invTotV_AvgValue = @stcValueV / @invTotV_TotalInput
    SELECT @invTotV_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValueV / @invTotV_TotalInput
   END
   ELSE
    IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
      @par_TrCode IN (
       @ft_AlFiyatFarki
       ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
       )
      )
    BEGIN
     SELECT @invTotV_AvgValue = @invTotV_AvgValue + @addExpValue
     SELECT @invTotV_CurrAvgValue = @invTotV_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
     SELECT @invTotV_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
     SELECT @invTotV_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
    END
  END
 END
 IF (@par_UpdAvgFlag = 1) AND (@par_UpdForTotFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @genDt_TotalInput = @genDt_Transferred + @genDt_PurchaseAmount + @genDt_ActProdIn + @genDt_CountAdd +
   @genDt_ActOtherInput
  IF (@genDt_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genDt_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @stcValue = @genDt_AvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @stcValue = @genDt_TotalInput * @genDt_AvgValue
  IF (@genDt_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genDt_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @currStcValue = @genDt_CurrAvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @currStcValue = @genDt_TotalInput * @genDt_CurrAvgValue
  IF (@par_TrCode <> @ft_Ambar)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @stcValue = @stcValue + @addExpValue
   SELECT @currStcValue = @currStcValue + @currAddExpValue
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
   SELECT @stcValue = @stcValue
   SELECT @currStcValue = @currStcValue
  END
  SELECT @genDt_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @genDt_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @genDt_PurchaseAmount + @inc_ActOtherIn +
   @genDt_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @genDt_ActProdIn + @genDt_CountAdd + @inc_CountAdd
  IF (@genDt_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @genDt_AvgValue = @stcValue / @genDt_TotalInput
   SELECT @genDt_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValue / @genDt_TotalInput
  END
  ELSE
   IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
     @par_TrCode IN (
      @ft_AlFiyatFarki
      ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
      )
     )
   BEGIN
    SELECT @genDt_AvgValue = @genDt_AvgValue + @addExpValue
    SELECT @genDt_CurrAvgValue = @genDt_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    SELECT @genDt_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
    SELECT @genDt_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
   END
  IF (@par_VariantRef IS NOT NULL) AND (@par_VariantRef > 0)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @genDtV_TotalInput = @genDtV_Transferred + @genDtV_PurchaseAmount + @genDtV_ActProdIn + @genDtV_CountAdd +
    @genDtV_ActOtherInput
   IF (@genDtV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genDtV_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @stcValueV = @genDtV_AvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @stcValueV = @genDtV_TotalInput * @genDtV_AvgValue
   IF (@genDtV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genDtV_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @genDtV_CurrAvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @genDtV_TotalInput * @genDtV_CurrAvgValue
   IF (@par_TrCode <> @ft_Ambar)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @stcValueV = @stcValueV + @addExpValue
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @currStcValueV + @currAddExpValue
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    SELECT @stcValueV = @stcValueV
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @currStcValueV
   END
   SELECT @genDtV_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @genDtV_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @genDtV_PurchaseAmount +
    @inc_ActOtherIn + @genDtV_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @genDtV_ActProdIn + @invDtV_CountAdd + @inc_CountAdd
   IF (@genDtV_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @genDtV_AvgValue = @stcValueV / @genDtV_TotalInput
    SELECT @genDtV_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValueV / @genDtV_TotalInput
   END
   ELSE
    IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
      @par_TrCode IN (
       @ft_AlFiyatFarki
       ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
       )
      )
    BEGIN
     SELECT @genDtV_AvgValue = @genDtV_AvgValue + @addExpValue
     SELECT @genDtV_CurrAvgValue = @genDtV_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
     SELECT @genDtV_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
     SELECT @genDtV_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
    END
  END
 END
 IF (@par_UpdAvgFlag = 1) AND (@par_UpdForTotFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @genTot_TotalInput = @genTot_Transferred + @genTot_PurchaseAmount + @genTot_ActProdIn + @genTot_CountAdd +
   @genTot_ActOtherInput
  IF (@genTot_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genTot_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @stcValue = @genTot_AvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @stcValue = @genTot_TotalInput * @genTot_AvgValue
  IF (@genTot_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genTot_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
   SELECT @currStcValue = @genTot_CurrAvgValue
  ELSE
   SELECT @currStcValue = @genTot_TotalInput * @genTot_CurrAvgValue
  IF (@par_TrCode <> @ft_Ambar)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @stcValue = @stcValue + @addExpValue
   SELECT @currStcValue = @currStcValue + @currAddExpValue
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
   SELECT @stcValue = @stcValue
   SELECT @currStcValue = @currStcValue
  END
  SELECT @genTot_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @genTot_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @genTot_PurchaseAmount + @inc_ActOtherIn +
   @genTot_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @genTot_ActProdIn + @genTot_CountAdd + @inc_CountAdd
  IF (@genTot_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @genTot_AvgValue = @stcValue / @genTot_TotalInput
   SELECT @genTot_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValue / @genTot_TotalInput
  END
  ELSE
   IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
     @par_TrCode IN (
      @ft_AlFiyatFarki
      ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
      )
     )
   BEGIN
    SELECT @genTot_AvgValue = @genTot_AvgValue + @addExpValue
    SELECT @genTot_CurrAvgValue = @genTot_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    SELECT @genTot_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
    SELECT @genTot_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
   END
  IF (@par_VariantRef IS NOT NULL) AND (@par_VariantRef > 0)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @genTotV_TotalInput = @genTotV_Transferred + @genTotV_PurchaseAmount + @genTotV_ActProdIn + @genTotV_CountAdd +
    @genTotV_ActOtherInput
   IF (@genTotV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genTotV_AvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @stcValueV = @genTotV_AvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @stcValueV = @genTotV_TotalInput * @genTotV_AvgValue
   IF (@genTotV_TotalInput = 0) AND (ABS(@genTotV_CurrAvgValue) > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @genTotV_CurrAvgValue
   ELSE
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @genTotV_TotalInput * @genTotV_CurrAvgValue
   IF (@par_TrCode <> @ft_Ambar)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @stcValueV = @stcValueV + @addExpValue
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @currStcValueV + @currAddExpValue
   END
   ELSE
   BEGIN
    SELECT @stcValueV = @stcValueV
    SELECT @currStcValueV = @currStcValueV
   END
   SELECT @genTotV_TotalInput = @inc_Transfer + @genTotV_Transferred + @inc_Purchase + @genTotV_PurchaseAmount +
    @inc_ActOtherIn + @genTotV_ActOtherInput + @inc_ActProdIn + @genTotV_ActProdIn + @genTotV_CountAdd + @inc_CountAdd
   IF (@genTotV_TotalInput > @Epsilon)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @genTotV_AvgValue = @stcValueV / @genTotV_TotalInput
    SELECT @genTotV_CurrAvgValue = @currStcValueV / @genTotV_TotalInput
   END
   ELSE
    IF (@par_InvoiceRef <> 0) AND (
      @par_TrCode IN (
       @ft_AlFiyatFarki
       ,@ft_VerFiyatFarki
       )
      )
    BEGIN
     SELECT @genTotV_AvgValue = @genTotV_AvgValue + @addExpValue
     SELECT @genTotV_CurrAvgValue = @genTotV_CurrAvgValue + @currAddExpValue
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
     SELECT @genTotV_AvgValue = @par_DiffPrice
     SELECT @genTotV_CurrAvgValue = @par_DiffRepPrice
    END
  END
 END
 IF (@par_UpdOrderFlag = 1)
  IF (@par_OrdRecvFlag = 1)
  BEGIN
   IF (@par_OrdResFlag = 1)
   BEGIN
    SELECT @inc_Reserved = @inc_Reserved + @addOrdAmount
   END
   SELECT @inc_ActSaleOrder = @addOrdAmount
   SELECT @inc_Shipped = - 1 * @addAmount
  END
  ELSE
   IF (
     (
      @par_TrCode NOT IN (
       @ft_KonsCikIade
       ,@ft_Ambar
       )
      ) OR (
      (@par_TrCode = @ft_KonsCikIade) AND (@par_InvoiceRef = 0
       )
      )
     )
   BEGIN
    SELECT @incAmount = @addOrdAmount
    SELECT @inc_ActPurchaseOrder = - 1 * @incAmount
    SELECT @inc_Received = @addAmount
   END
 IF (@par_UpdSaleFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  IF (@par_TrCode <> 14)
   SELECT @inc_SaleAmount = - @addAmount
  SELECT @inc_SaleInCash = - @addValue
  SELECT @inc_CurrSaleInCash = - @currAddValue
 END
 IF (@par_UpdPurchaseFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  IF (@par_TrCode <> 13)
   SELECT @inc_PurchaseAmount = @addAmount
  SELECT @inc_PurchaseInCash = @addValue
  SELECT @inc_CurrPurchaseInCash = @currAddValue
 END
 IF (@par_UpdOrderFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  IF (@par_UOMRef = @par_OrdUOMRef) /*the same unit in order and dispatch*/
   SELECT @adjustedAmount = @par_Coef * @par_Amount
  ELSE
   IF (@orderConvFactor > @Epsilon)
    SELECT @adjustedAmount = @par_Coef * @convertedAmount / @orderConvFactor
   ELSE
    SELECT @adjustedAmount = @par_Coef * @convertedAmount
  IF (
    @par_TrCode IN (
     @ft_AlimIade
     ,@ft_TopSatIade
     ,@ft_PerSatIade
     ,@ft_KonsGirIade
     ,@ft_KonsCikIade
     )
    )
   SELECT @ordUpdAmount = - 1 * @adjustedAmount
  ELSE
   SELECT @ordUpdAmount = @adjustedAmount
  IF (@par_fcStat = 0) OR (@par_fcStat IS NULL)
  BEGIN
    IF (@par_LineType <> @c_LClass)
     UPDATE LG_523_01_ORFLINE
     SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = SHIPPEDAMOUNT + (@ordUpdAmount)
     WHERE (LOGICALREF = @par_OrdTransRef)
    IF (@par_DetLine = 1) AND (@par_PrevLineRef <> 0) AND (@par_PrevLineNo <> 0)
     UPDATE LG_523_01_ORFLINE
     SET SHIPPEDAMOUNT = SHIPPEDAMOUNT + @ordUpdAmount
     WHERE (ORDFICHEREF = @par_OrdFicheRef) AND (LINENO_ = @par_PrevLineNo) AND (STOCKREF = @par_PrevLineRef) AND (DETLINE = 0)
  END
  IF (@par_fcStat = 1) AND ((@par_Coef = 1) OR (@ShippedAmntSugg > 0))
  BEGIN
    IF (@par_LineType <> @c_LClass)
     UPDATE LG_523_01_ORFLINE
     SET SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG = SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG + (@ordUpdAmount)
     WHERE (LOGICALREF = @par_OrdTransRef)
    IF (@par_DetLine = 1) AND (@par_PrevLineRef <> 0) AND (@par_PrevLineNo <> 0)
     UPDATE LG_523_01_ORFLINE
     SET SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG = SHIPPEDAMNTSUGG + @ordUpdAmount
     WHERE (ORDFICHEREF = @par_OrdFicheRef) AND (LINENO_ = @par_PrevLineNo) AND (STOCKREF = @par_PrevLineRef) AND (DETLINE = 0)
  END
 END
 IF (@par_UpdOrdOnVehFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @inc_OnVehicled = @addAmount
  IF (@par_UpdOrderFlag = 0)
  BEGIN
   SELECT @ordUpdAmount = @par_Coef * @par_Amount
   IF (
     @par_TrCode IN (
      @ft_AlimIade
      ,@ft_TopSatIade
      ,@ft_PerSatIade
      ,@ft_KonsGirIade
      ,@ft_KonsCikIade
      )
     )
    SELECT @ordUpdAmount = - 1 * @ordUpdAmount
   ELSE
    SELECT @ordUpdAmount = @ordUpdAmount
  END
  IF EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_523_01_ORFLINE
              WHERE LOGICALREF = @par_OrdTransRef)
     UPDATE LG_523_01_ORFLINE
   SET ONVEHICLE = ONVEHICLE - @ordUpdAmount
   WHERE (LOGICALREF = @par_OrdTransRef)
  IF EXISTS(SELECT LOGICALREF FROM LG_523_01_DISTORDLINE
              WHERE LOGICALREF = @par_DistOrdLineRef)
     UPDATE LG_523_01_DISTORDLINE
   SET REMAMOUNT = REMAMOUNT - @ordUpdAmount
   WHERE (LOGICALREF = @par_DistOrdLineRef)
 END
 IF (@par_UpdResFlag = 1)
 BEGIN
  SELECT @inc_Reserved = @inc_Reserved - @addAmount
 END
 IF (@par_offTrRef <> 0)
 BEGIN
  IF (@par_LineType <> @c_LClass)
   UPDATE LG_523_PURCHOFFERLN
   SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = ORDEREDAMOUNT + @inc_OffOrdAmount
   WHERE (LOGICALREF = @par_offTrRef)
  IF (@par_DetLine = 1) AND (@par_PrevLineRef <> 0) AND (@par_PrevLineNo <> 0
    )
   UPDATE LG_523_PURCHOFFERLN
   SET ORDEREDAMOUNT = ORDEREDAMOUNT + @inc_OffOrdAmount
   WHERE (ORDFICHEREF = @par_offerRef) AND (LINENO_ = @par_PrevLineNo) AND (STOCKREF = @par_PrevLineRef
     ) AND (DETLINE = 0)
 END
END
